name: Group POP
description: The Group POP lets you put sets of points or primitives into named groups so that you can then use the groups in other POPs, such as the [[Transform POP]] to affect only the elements of particular groups. The groups are formed using 5 methods found on the Attribute, Thin, Pattern, Group and Bounding pages. You can choose to group points or primitives. On the Attribute page you can group based on the values of point or primitive attributes. On the Thin page you can group based on parameter-defined ranges, steps or randomly. You can group by [[Pattern Matching]] on the Pattern page. You can combine point or primitive groups on the Group page. You can include based on bounding ranges on any attribute on the Bounding page. Conversions of groups can be done on the Edit page- renaming, conversion from point group to primitive group, etc. Four of the grouping methods let you build the logic using sequential blocks of parameters. For example on the Attribute page, one block selects P(0) > 0 and another that selects P(1) < 0 and ANDed together they will group points in only a quarter of the space. Otherwise is common to build an attribute in a [[Math Mix POP]] and use it in the Group POP. For pattern matching on the Pattern page: [[Pattern Matching]]. See also [[Delete POP]]

parameters.name: Group Name
parameters.label: Group Name
parameters.description: The name of the group to be created.

parameters.name: Entity
parameters.label: Entity
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class to use.

parameters.name: Debug Color
parameters.label: Debug Color
parameters.description: Enable addition of a color attribute to differentiate groups.

parameters.name: Attribute
parameters.label: Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attribute conditions.

parameters.name: Enabled
parameters.label: Enabled
parameters.description: Enable thinning by index range, index step or random index.

parameters.name: Thin Out Range
parameters.label: Thin Out Range
parameters.description: Enable index-based point filtering.

parameters.name: Thin Range Start
parameters.label: Thin Range Start
parameters.description: Determines the starting index for range-based point filtering.

parameters.name: Thin Range Length
parameters.label: Thin Range Length
parameters.description: Determines the number of points being filtered by index range.

parameters.name: Thin Step
parameters.label: Thin Step
parameters.description: Filters every Nth point.

parameters.name: Thin Random
parameters.label: Thin Random
parameters.description: Determines the proportion of points randomly filtered.

parameters.name: Thin Random Seed
parameters.label: Thin Random Seed
parameters.description: Sets the random seed for points being randomly filtered.

parameters.name: Invert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Invert the selection resulting from the current conditions in the block.

parameters.name: Pattern
parameters.label: Pattern
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for index-matching pattern.

parameters.name: Group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this POP to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: Bound
parameters.label: Bound
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for bounding volumes.

parameters.name: Convert Type
parameters.label: Convert Type
parameters.description: Sets the converion operation type to apply to a group

parameters.name: Convert Group
parameters.label: Convert Group
parameters.description: Sets the groupe name to convert when converting a group type

parameters.name: Convert Name
parameters.label: Convert Name
parameters.description: Sets the resulting groupe name when converting a group type

parameters.name: Preserve Original
parameters.label: Preserve Original
parameters.description: Keep original attribute class group when converting.

parameters.name: Old Group Name
parameters.label: Old Group Name
parameters.description: Old group name when renaming a group.

parameters.name: New Group Name
parameters.label: New Group Name
parameters.description: Name for the new group created.

parameters.name: Delete Group
parameters.label: Delete Group
parameters.description: Groups to delete.
